case_title: RENEE JONES VS. ALBERT G. STOLL, JR., A LAW CORPORATION et al

MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $3,080.00 FILED BY JONES, RENEE AS TO DEFENDANT ALBERT G. STOLL, JR., A LAW CORPORATION EINFELD, CHRISTIAN ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR SEP-14-2011 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506
